hero.subtitle: Turn one thought into content for every platform.

visual_demo.heading: One source of expertise. Six points of presence.

modules.heading: The approach has changed. So has the tool.
modules.subheading: Creating content is no longer enough. Algorithms weigh audience behavior, SEO and GEO signals, and author authority. PRIZMA factors all of this in and adapts every format to the right channel.

items.name: Post
items.desc: Visual proof of expertise. Not just a graphic — a post that anchors the expert's position in the feed and builds long-term trust.

items.name: Reel
items.desc: Short video with an expert message. Algorithms push it organically. The fastest way to reach new audiences without paid ads.

items.name: Carousel
items.desc: Deep expertise in an accessible format. Carousels get saved and revisited. Content your audience comes back to.

items.name: Article
items.desc: SEO and GEO-optimized content that works for years. PRIZMA accounts for behavioral signals and structures text around real audience queries.

items.name: Avatar
items.desc: The expert shows up daily — without filming. An AI avatar delivers the expert's voice and presence in video format, every day.

items.name: Repost
items.desc: One piece of content across every platform. PRIZMA adapts tone, length, and format per channel while keeping the expert message intact.

why.heading: PRIZMA is not a content generator. It is an intelligent system.
why.text: Most tools just generate text. PRIZMA does something different: it studies your audience behavior, accounts for SEO and GEO signals, analyzes what works, and gets sharper over time. Content passes through a humanizer so it sounds like a real expert — not a machine. Human in the loop means the final call is always yours.

stats.label: in the loop — you stay in control

items.title: Experts and founders
items.desc: You know your field. PRIZMA broadcasts that expertise across every platform. No copywriter, no film crew, no loss of your authentic voice.

items.title: Marketers
items.desc: Produce 6x more content in the same time. Every format is optimized for the platform algorithm. Organic reach grows without increasing budget.

items.title: Agencies
items.desc: Scale production for clients without hiring. One specialist manages multiple brands while keeping each one's unique voice intact.

items.title: Personal brands
items.desc: Stay present everywhere, every day — even when focused on your core work. PRIZMA maintains your expert image without constant involvement.

steps.title: Topic
steps.desc: You provide a topic, idea, or expert thesis

steps.title: PRIZMA
steps.desc: AI researches the topic, accounts for SEO/GEO signals, and creates six formats

steps.title: Human in the loop
steps.desc: You review the result — the final decision is always yours

steps.title: Publish
steps.desc: Content is automatically distributed to all platforms

showcase.heading: A real example.
showcase.subtitle: One expert thesis. Three ready-to-publish pieces.

cta.heading: 7 days free. No commitment.
cta.subtitle: Leave a request and we will run a test drive on your topic — and show exactly how PRIZMA amplifies your expertise.

seo.title: PRIZMA — Intelligent content system for scaling expertise
seo.description: PRIZMA turns expertise into content for every platform. SEO and GEO optimization, humanizer, six formats from one source — with human control at every step.
